headline: 5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From Deere’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Deere’s first quarter results outpaced Wall Street expectations on both revenue and profit, yet the market responded negatively, with shares declining sharply. Management attributed the quarter’s performance to strong demand in construction and small agriculture equipment, alongside positive impacts from one-time tariff refunds. However, elevated production costs and persistent margin headwinds, especially in the large agriculture segment, weighed on operating profitability. CFO Josh Beal emphas
